Homepage.title: Share Expenses with Friends & Family
Homepage.description: Track shared expenses and settle up. Free and open source, synced and secured by your account.

groupsSync.title: Groups + sync
groupsSync.description: Create groups for trips, events, gifts, and keep them synced across devices.

expenses.title: Expenses + receipts
expenses.description: Add expenses, attach receipt images, and create daily, weekly, or monthly recurring costs.

splitting.title: Advanced split
splitting.description: Split by percentage, shares, exact amount, or a simple equal share.

settlement.title: Balances
settlement.description: See who paid what and optimize money transfers between participants.

organization.title: Categories
organization.description: Assign categories so shared spending stays easy to scan.

accounts.title: Accounts
accounts.description: Sign in once to protect your data and keep your expense history available.

Footer.madeIn: Made by the open-source community with love ❤️

Expenses.title: Expenses
Expenses.description: Here are the expenses that you created for your group.
Expenses.noExpenses: Your group doesn’t contain any expense yet.

ActiveUserModal.title: Who are you?
ActiveUserModal.description: Tell us which participant you are to let us customize how the information is displayed.
ActiveUserModal.nobody: I don’t want to select anyone
ActiveUserModal.footer: This setting can be changed later in the group settings.

Groups.createdInviteHint: Group created. Invite members to get started.

NoRecent.description: You don't have any group yet.
NoRecent.orAsk: or ask a friend to invite you to their group.

NoRecentAllHidden.description: You have hidden all of your groups.

Groups.archiveWithBalancesDescription: This group has unsettled balances. Archiving will create settlement expenses to zero them out. Continue?
Groups.archiveWithBalancesSuccess: Settlement expenses created and group archived.
Groups.archiveSectionDescription: Archiving freezes the group. No new expenses can be added or modified, but the existing data stays visible. You can unarchive the group at any time.
Groups.bannerArchivedDescription: No new expenses or invitations can be added while the group is archived. Existing data stays visible.
Groups.bannerArchived: This group is archived. No new expenses can be added.
Groups.invitationBannerTitle: You've been invited to this group
Groups.invitationBannerDescription: Accept to join as a member, or decline to discard the invitation.
Groups.pendingInviteeReadOnlyDescription: Accept the invitation above to start adding expenses and changing group settings. Until then, this group is read-only.
Groups.pendingInviteeSettingsDescription: You need to accept the invitation before you can change group settings or invite members.
Groups.pendingInviteeExpenseDescription: Accept the invitation above to start adding or editing expenses. Until then, the group's existing data is visible but cannot be modified.
Groups.archivedReadOnly: This group is archived. Expenses can no longer be added or modified.

RecentRemovedToast.title: Group has been removed
RecentRemovedToast.description: The group was removed from your recent groups list.

Importable.title: Found this group on spliit.app
Importable.description: "{name}" is reachable on spliit.app. Would you like to import it into Spliit Cloud?

Unauthorized.title: You don't have access to this group
Unauthorized.description: If you believe this is a mistake, ask a group owner or admin to invite you.

invitations.title: Pending invitations
invitations.description: You have been invited to join the following groups.

Groups.linkInvitationBannerDescription: {inviter} invited you to join {groupName} on Spliit.
Groups.linkInvitationSingleUse: This link can only be used once. After you accept, it will stop working.
Groups.linkInvitationAlreadyMemberDescription: You already have an account on this group. The invite link isn't needed.
Groups.linkInvitationExpiredTitle: This invite link is no longer valid
Groups.linkInvitationExpiredDescription: The link was either revoked, declined, or has expired. Ask the inviter to send a new one.

linkInvitationInvalid.title: This invite link is invalid
linkInvitationInvalid.description: The link is malformed or doesn't match any invitation on this group.

Import.notFound: Spliit did not find this group

Source.spliitDescription: Bring an existing spliit.app group into Spliit Cloud. We read the group name, participants, and every expense so nothing is lost in the import.
Source.splitwiseComingTitle: Splitwise import is on the way
Source.splitwiseComingDescription: We're working on bringing Splitwise CSV exports into Spliit Cloud. The flow will be available here once it ships — no need to re-import anything in the meantime.
Source.tricountComingTitle: Tricount import is on the way
Source.tricountComingDescription: Tricount CSV export support is on the roadmap.
Source.settleUpComingTitle: Settle Up import is on the way
Source.settleUpComingDescription: Settle Up CSV export support is on the roadmap.
Source.dropFile: Drop a JSON or CSV file, or click to select
Source.dropFileDescription: JSON preserves every amount and payer exactly. CSV is a fallback — Spliit rounds each per-participant amount to 2 decimals.
Source.urlDescription: Our server fetches the group through the spliit.app public export endpoint on your behalf.
Source.receiptWarningDescription: Spliit's export references the original receipt URL, but the new group's storage is separate. Re-upload receipts in the destination group if you need them.
Source.invalidUrl: Please paste a valid spliit.app group URL
Source.notFoundUrl: Spliit did not find this group
Source.appToCloudDescription: Change .app to .cloud in any spliit.app group URL to import it into Spliit Cloud.

Destination.heading: Where would you like to import {name}? ({participantCount} participants · {expenseCount} expenses)
Destination.noAdminGroups: You don't administer any group yet.

Mapping.noLinkAccount: No participant is linked to your account. The importer (you) will be created as a fresh owner participant on the imported group — their share of the imported expenses will be zero until you link a source row to your account or invite yourself.

Row.linkToMeDescription: Connects this person to your account.
Row.linkToMeFollowUp: {name} will be linked to your account on this group. Their past and future expenses will appear under your name.
Row.inviteByEmailDescription: Sends an invite mail after the import commits.
Row.selfEmailDetected: That's your email — switched to "Link to me".
Row.inviteByLinkDescription: Generates a shareable URL on the Done step.
Row.inviteByLinkFollowUp: We'll generate a single-use shareable URL after the import commits. You'll find it on the Done step — copy and send it to {name} yourself.
Row.linkToExistingDescription: Maps this person to an existing active member or pending invite in the destination group. No new participant is created.
Row.leaveUnlinkedDescription: Keeps the name only — link later from Members.
Row.leaveUnlinkedFollowUp: {name} will appear as a name-only entry with no app access. You can link them to an account later from the Members tab.

Errors.duplicateExistingMember: Two source rows are mapped to the same existing member.
Errors.inviteConflictsPending: You're inviting {email} but they're already a pending invite; link to them instead.
Errors.inviteConflictsMember: You're inviting {email} but they're already a member of this group; link to them instead.
Errors.duplicateMemberName: Two existing members look like the same person — pick one.
Errors.onlyOneLinkedAccount: Only one source row can be linked to your account.
Errors.missingExistingMember: Pick an existing member to link to.
Errors.missingEmail: Add an email address to invite by email.
Errors.selfEmailAddress: This is your email — pick "Link to me" instead.
Errors.duplicateEmail: This email is already invited from another row.

Confirm.participantBreakdown: {linked} linked · {email} email invites · {link} link invites · {unlinked} unlinked
Confirm.footer: Every source participant and expense will be imported. Invitations are sent / generated after the group is created.

Done.description: Your imported group is ready. You can adjust participants, link unlinked entries to accounts, or edit any expense as usual.
Done.shareableLinksDescription: Copy each link and send it to the matching person. The link is single-use; they join the group as soon as they open it.
Done.emailInvitesDescription: The server emailed the following people. They'll see an Accept/Decline banner in the group page when they sign in.
Done.shareText: Join our expense group on Spliit Cloud — {name}. Open this link to accept: {url}

Auth.title: Sign in to Spliit Cloud
Auth.subtitle: Use your account to access your groups across devices.
Auth.signUpSubtitle: Create an account to save and sync your groups across devices.
Auth.passwordFormDescription: If you'd rather use a password, enter your email and password below.
Auth.passwordFormDescriptionSignUp: Create an account with your email and a password.
Auth.magicLinkSent: Check your inbox for a sign-in link.
Auth.verificationEmailSent: Check your inbox to verify your account.
Auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.magicLinkFailed: Could not send the sign-in link.
errors.passwordPolicy: Use at least 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase, a number, and a symbol.

Auth.required: You need to sign in to access your groups.

AccountSettings.title: Account settings

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Update how you appear to your groups.

AccountSettings.emailHelp: Your email is tied to your account and can't be changed here.

errors.nameTooShort: Name must be at least 2 characters.
errors.nameTooLong: Name must be at most 50 characters.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

CompleteProfile.title: Complete your profile
CompleteProfile.description: Tell us the name you'd like your groups to see. You can change it later.

errors.nameTooShort: Name must be at least 2 characters.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

ForgotPassword.title: Reset your password
ForgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your account email and we'll send you a link to choose a new password.
ForgotPassword.emailSent: If an account exists for that email, you'll receive a reset link shortly.

errors.sendFailed: Could not send the reset link. Please try again.

ResetPassword.title: Choose a new password
ResetPassword.subtitle: Enter the new password for your Spliit account.
ResetPassword.successDescription: Your password has been changed. Sign in with your new password to continue.
ResetPassword.invalidTokenTitle: This reset link can't be used
ResetPassword.invalidTokenDescription: The link may have expired or already been used. Request a new one to try again.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.invalidToken: This reset link has expired or already been used.
errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.passwordPolicy: Use at least 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase, a number, and a symbol.

GroupForm.title: Group information
GroupForm.readOnlyNote: Only owners and admins can change group settings.
GroupForm.archivedNotice: This group is archived. Its settings are frozen and can no longer be changed.

NameField.label: Group name
NameField.description: Enter a name for your group.

InformationField.label: Group information
InformationField.placeholder: What information is relevant to group participants?

CurrencyField.label: Currency symbol
CurrencyField.description: We’ll use it to display amounts.

CurrencyCodeField.label: Main currency
CurrencyCodeField.createDescription: All amounts and balances will be in this currency.
CurrencyCodeField.editDescription: All amounts and balances will be in this currency. Changing this will NOT convert expenses already entered, except when the currency has different "minor units" than the current one (e.g. changing from US Dollar to Japanese Yen)

Participants.title: Participants
Participants.description: Enter the name for each participant.
Participants.protectedParticipant: This participant is part of expenses, and can not be removed.

Settings.title: Local settings
Settings.description: These settings are set per-device, and are used to customize your experience.

ActiveUserField.label: Active user
ActiveUserField.description: User used as default for paying expenses.

Settings.inviteAfterCreate: After the group is created, open the Members tab to invite people by email or by shareable link.

TitleField.label: Income title
TitleField.description: Enter a description for the income.

DateField.label: Income date
DateField.description: Enter the date the income was received.

currencyField.label: Currency of income
currencyField.description: The currency in which the income was received.

paidByField.label: Received by
paidByField.description: Select the participant who received the income.

paidFor.title: Received for
paidFor.description: Select who the income was received for.

Income.splitModeDescription: Select how to split the income.
Income.attachDescription: See and attach receipts to the income.

TitleField.label: Expense title
TitleField.description: Enter a description for the expense.

DateField.label: Expense date
DateField.description: Enter the date the expense was paid.

currencyField.label: Currency of expense
currencyField.description: The currency in which the expense was paid.

paidByField.label: Paid by
paidByField.description: Select the participant who paid the expense.

recurrenceRule.label: Expense Recurrence
recurrenceRule.description: Select how often the expense should repeat.

paidFor.title: Paid for
paidFor.description: Select who the expense was paid for.

Expense.splitModeDescription: Select how to split the expense.
Expense.attachDescription: See and attach receipts to the expense.

ExpenseForm.conversionUnavailable: To set a different currency per expense and convert amounts, select a non-custom currency for the group.

conversionRateState.error: Oops, we could not get the most recent rates.
conversionRateState.currencyNotFound: Oops, Frankfurter does not have the rate for this currency at this day.
conversionRateState.noDate: Enter the expense date to get a conversion rate.

DeletePopup.label: Delete
DeletePopup.title: Delete this expense?
DeletePopup.description: Do you really want to delete this expense? This action is irreversible.

ExpenseForm.readOnlyNotice: This group is archived. The expense is shown read-only.

TooBigToast.title: The file is too big
TooBigToast.description: The maximum file size you can upload is {maxSize}. Yours is {size}.

ErrorToast.title: Error while uploading document
ErrorToast.description: Something wrong happened when uploading the document. Please retry later or select a different file.

Dialog.title: Create from receipt
Dialog.description: Extract the expense information from a receipt photo.
Dialog.body: Upload the photo of a receipt, and we’ll scan it to extract the expense information if we can.
Dialog.editNext: You’ll be able to edit the expense information next.

TooBigToast.title: The file is too big
TooBigToast.description: The maximum file size you can upload is {maxSize}. Yours is {size}.

ErrorToast.title: Error while uploading document
ErrorToast.description: Something wrong happened when uploading the document. Please retry later or select a different file.

Balances.title: Balances
Balances.description: This is the amount that each participant paid or was paid for.

Reimbursements.title: Suggested reimbursements
Reimbursements.description: Here are suggestions for optimized reimbursements between participants.
Reimbursements.noImbursements: It looks like your group doesn’t need any reimbursement 😁

Totals.title: Totals
Totals.description: Spending summary of the entire group.

Activity.title: Activity
Activity.description: Overview of all activity in this group.
Activity.noActivity: There is not yet any activity in your group.

Information.title: Information
Information.description: Use this place to add any information that can be relevant to the group participants.

Share.title: Share
Share.description: For other participants to see the group and add expenses, share its URL with them.
Share.warningHelp: Every person with the group URL will be able to see and edit expenses. Share with caution!

SchemaErrors.duplicateParticipantName: Another participant already has this name.
SchemaErrors.amountNotZero: The amount must not be zero.
SchemaErrors.amountTenMillion: The amount must be lower than 10,000,000.
SchemaErrors.ratePositive: The rate must be strictly greater than zero.
SchemaErrors.paidForMin1: The expense must be paid for at least one participant.
SchemaErrors.noZeroShares: All shares must be higher than 0.
SchemaErrors.amountSum: Sum of amounts must equal the expense amount.

Members.title: Members
Members.description: People who can see and contribute to this group.

removeDialog.title: Remove member?
removeDialog.description: Remove {name} from this group? Their past expenses stay in the ledger but they will no longer have access.

unsettled.title: Remove member with unsettled balance?
unsettled.description: Remove {name} from this group? They have unsettled balances — tick the box below to settle them automatically before removing.

warning.title: This member has unsettled balances
warning.description: Removing without settling will leave these balances in the ledger indefinitely. Tick the box below to create one reimbursement expense per leg involving this member before removing them, or remove without settling and deal with the balances manually.

Members.noManagePermission: Only admins can invite, revoke, or manage group members.
Members.archivedNotice: Invitations and member management are disabled while the group is archived. Unarchive the group to invite new members.

invite.title: Invite member

link.singleUse: This invite link can be used once. After someone accepts it, the link will stop working.
link.created: Invite link ready. Copy and share it before the group leaves this page.
link.intro: Here's your single-use invite link for {groupName}. Send it to the person you want to join — the first one to use it becomes a member, then the link stops working.
link.shareText:
I just created {groupName} for our shared expenses on Spliit Cloud. Here's a one-time invite link — open it to join:
{inviteUrl}

invite.emailDescription: Send an invitation by email. The invitee joins once they accept from a matching account.
invite.linkDescription: Generate a single-use link anyone can use to join. The link stops working after the first accept.

revokeDialog.title: Revoke invitation?
revokeDialog.description: Revoke the invitation to {email}? They have not accepted yet.

unsettled.title: Settle balances before revoking
unsettled.description: Revoke the invitation to {email}? Their balances must be settled first.

warning.title: This invitation has unsettled balances
warning.description: Tick the box below to create one reimbursement expense per leg involving this invitee before revoking. The invitation can only be revoked once the balances are settled.

unsettled.checkbox: Settle the invitee's balances before revoking

leave.title: Leave group?
leave.description: You will lose access to this group's expenses, balances, and activity. Past data is kept in the ledger so other members can still see it.

body.otherAdmins: These admins will keep control after you leave: {names}.

lastAdmin.title: Choose a new admin
lastAdmin.description: You are the last admin of this group. Pick an active member to take over before you leave, otherwise no one will be able to manage the group.

unsettled.title: You have unsettled balances
unsettled.description: Leaving with force will auto-create reimbursement expenses for the legs involving you so the ledger stays in sync. Other balances are left as-is.

lastMember.title: This will delete the group
lastMember.description: You are the only active member of this group. Leaving will permanently delete the group, all its expenses, and all its history.
lastMember.checkbox: I understand that this will permanently delete the group and all its data.
lastMember.suggestion: Tip: if you want to keep this group as a record, you can archive it instead.
lastMember.unsettledInfo: You have unsettled balances in this group. They will be lost permanently when the group is deleted.

error.lastAdmin: Choose a member to promote to admin before leaving.
error.lastMember: Confirm the permanent deletion to continue.
error.unsettled: Settle your balance or confirm forced settlement to leave.

unlinked.title: Unlinked participants
unlinked.description: These people have a name in the group but no app account yet. Link each to an existing account to associate their expenses with that user.

linkDialog.title: Link unlinked participant
linkDialog.description: Pick the existing member that {displayName} should be linked to. The destination must not already be on the opposite side of an expense leg with this participant.
linkDialog.noCandidates: No compatible members found. This usually means this unlinked participant is on both sides of an expense leg with every other member — the import needs to be redone or expenses adjusted first.
linkDialog.pendingHint: Linking to a pending invitation merges this name-only entry into the invitee. The invitee keeps their own row; the merged references now resolve through it when they accept.
